(Manager) Set stock assignment to a shop
(Admin) Set manager assignment to a shop
(Manager) Add n units to a shop's product stock (if exists)

(Admin) Update product images (remove unused, add new)
(Admin) Toggle product global activation by ID
(Admin, Manager) Comment and/or update order status by ID

delete.summary: (Admin) Delete cancelled or completed order by ID

put.summary: (User) Update logged user cart product quantity

post.summary: (User) Add item to logged user cart

put.summary: (User) Cancel logged user order by ID

get.summary: (User) Check if a product is in logged user favourites

post.summary: (User) Add product to logged user favourites

delete.summary: (User) Delete product from logged user favourites

post.summary: (Admin, Manager) Set assigned truck to an order
(All) Refresh logged user JWT access token

get.summary: (All) Check if a username is taken
(All) Check if an email is taken
(Admin) Get all available drivers (no truck assigned)
(Driver) Get assigned truck by driver ID

(Admin, Manager) Get trucks list by shop ID
(Admin, Manager) Get truck statistics by role
(Admin, Manager) Get shop statistics by role
(Admin, Manager, Driver) Get order statistics by role

(All) Get shop stock page by ID
(User) Get all available shops to be selected
(Admin) Get user reviews by user ID (paged)
(All) Get all reviews by product ID
(Manager) Get eligible products by shop ID
(Admin) Get user orders by user ID (paged)
(User) Get logged user cart item by product ID
(Admin, Manager, Driver) Get orders by role (paged)

(User) Delete logged user address by ID
